lanes.label: OpenClaw

capabilities.label: Remote approvals
capabilities.detail: Messaging-first control plane with phone-friendly inbox patterns.

capabilities.label: Managed skills
capabilities.detail: Bundled, managed, and workspace skills are supported.

capabilities.label: Multi-channel routing
capabilities.detail: Routes messages and approvals across Telegram and other channels.

lanes.launchCommand: (openclaw agents add fluxio_mission_openclaw_lane_proof_d228bebc --workspace C:\Users\paul\projects\vibe-coding-platform --model openai-codex/gpt-5.4-mini --non-interactive --json >nul 2>nul || openclaw models --agent fluxio_mission_openclaw_lane_proof_d228bebc set openai-codex/gpt-5.4-mini >nul 2>nul) && openclaw agent --agent fluxio_mission_openclaw_lane_proof_d228bebc --session-id fluxio_mission_openclaw_lane_proof --message "Prove runtime route metadata and skill visibility only. Do not call a model, edit files, or perform live red-team actions." --thinking medium --json
lanes.routeSummary: OpenClaw launch route: plan:executor -> openai-codex/gpt-5.4-mini (medium thinking)
lanes.proofMeaning: OpenClaw owns gateway-style execution, remote approvals, and JSON session output.

lanes.label: Hermes

capabilities.label: Scheduled automations
capabilities.detail: Hermes has built-in scheduling and long-running agent loops.

capabilities.label: Skills and memory
capabilities.detail: Hermes learns and recalls skills across sessions.

capabilities.label: Delegation
capabilities.detail: Hermes can spawn isolated subagents for parallel workstreams.

lanes.launchCommand: hermes chat -q "Prove runtime route metadata and skill visibility only. Do not call a model, edit files, or perform live red-team actions." -Q --model MiniMax-M3 --provider minimax
lanes.proofMeaning: Hermes owns long-running agent loops, scheduling, memory, and skill reuse.
